quick_wins.title: Navigation rail missing selected-state label emphasis
quick_wins.recommended_fix: Use the MD3 selected rail item treatment and label style tokens.

remediation_sequence.title: Hard-coded brand blue bypasses MD3 primary role
remediation_sequence.recommended_fix: Replace literal blue values with theme primary/container roles.

remediation_sequence.title: Navigation rail missing selected-state label emphasis
remediation_sequence.recommended_fix: Use the MD3 selected rail item treatment and label style tokens.

unresolved_risks.title: Hard-coded brand blue bypasses MD3 primary role
unresolved_risks.impact: The screen breaks seeded theming and dark-theme consistency.
